zh.Great Somerford, Wiltshire, England: 英國維爾爾格亞特 索莫福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Malville de Mauduit於大約1190年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾格亞特 索莫福德時，她的父親John Mauduit ( 1 Daughter)51歲，母親Adelina27歲。她於大約1220年與Michael de Stourton在英國英格蘭維爾爾斯圖頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1249年在英國維爾爾享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Malville de Mauduit于大约1190年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾格亞特 索莫福德时，她的父亲John Mauduit ( 1 Daughter)51岁，母亲Adelina27岁。她于大约1220年与Michael de Stourton在英国英格兰維爾爾斯圖頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1249年在英国維爾爾享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mauduit
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Mawditt
meanings: Norman, English: nickname from Old French mal-duit ‘badly brought up, ill educated’ (Latin male doctus).

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Malville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mainly North American: transferred use of the Scottish surname, which originated as a Norman baronial name borne by the lords of a place in northern France called Malleville ‘bad settlement’, i.e. settlement on infertile land. The name was taken to Scotland as early as the 12th century and became an important surname there; use as a given name seems also to have originated in Scotland.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Malville de Mauduit was born about 1190, in Great Somerford, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Mauduit ( 1 Daughter), was 51 and her mother, Adelina, was 27. She married Michael de Stourton about 1220, in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1249, in Wiltshire, England, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Malville de Mauduit est née environ 1190, à Great Somerford, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Mauduit ( 1 Daughter), avait 51 ans et sa mère, Adelina, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Michael de Stourton environ 1220, à Stourton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1249, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Malville de Mauduit um 1190 in Great Somerford, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Mauduit ( 1 Daughter) 51 und ihre Mutter Adelina 27. Sie hat um 1220 in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom Michael de Stourton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1249 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Wiltshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Malville de Mauduit è nata il circa 1190 nel Great Somerford, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Mauduit ( 1 Daughter), aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Adelina, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Michael de Stourton circa 1220, nel Stourton, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1249, nel Wiltshire, England, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Malville de Mauduitが約1190年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアグレアト ソメルフォードで生まれた時，父John Mauduit ( 1 Daughter)は51歳，母Adelinaは27歳であった。約1220年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアストウルトンでMichael de Stourtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1249年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Malville de Mauduit(이)가 대략 1190년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 그리트 서머퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Mauduit ( 1 Daughter)(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelina(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1220년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 스토우르턴에서 Michael de Stourton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1249년 영국 윌츠히르에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Malville de Mauduit nasceu aproximadamente 1190, em Great Somerford, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Mauduit ( 1 Daughter), tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Adelina, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Michael de Stourton aproximadamente 1220, em Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1249, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Malville de Mauduit родилась около 1190 г. в местности грит сомирфорд, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Mauduit ( 1 Daughter) было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Adelina, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Michael de Stourton около 1220 г. в местности стоуртон, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1249 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Malville de Mauduit nació aproximadamente 1190, en Great Somerford, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Mauduit ( 1 Daughter), tenía 51 años y su mamá, Adelina, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Michael de Stourton aproximadamente 1220, en Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1249, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años.
